behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, import paths ('../cli-client/registry'), response fields (sessions, clientInfo), and 'Global' default are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what behavior is needed without giving exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_grid_workspace_ordering requires exact regex match for 'currentWorkspace = clientInfo?.workspaceDir || "Global"' and literal 'key === currentWorkspace'; test_dashboard_api_sends_client_info requires exact sendJSON shape '{ sessions, clientInfo }' — alternative valid implementations (different variable names, inline expressions, different property ordering) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run node scripts that simulate sort logic and also run npm build/lint/tsc, not just string checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require specific source patterns plus simulated sort behavior giving different outputs; a stub wouldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover API response, grid sorting, default Global behavior, and DEPS.list update.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with section comments (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, repo_tests) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: The response schema { sessions, clientInfo } is documented in instruction.md.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files to look at are listed but exact lines/code not given; localization is appropriate given scope.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: DEPS.list edit is a single-line addition, bounded.
